person_name: Julia Mamaea, mother of Severus Alexander, Roman Empress
person_name_full: Julia Mamaea, mother of Severus Alexander, Roman Empress
notes: Mother of Roman Emperor Severus Alexander, noted for her piety and religious life.

docs.title: Ecclesiastical History, Book 6
docs.author: Eusebius
docs.excerpt: … emperor, Mammæa by name, was a most pious woman , if there ever was one, and of religious life. When the fame of Origen had extended everywhere and had come even to her ears, she desired greatly to see the man, and above all things to make trial of his celebrated understanding of divine things.
